description: shadcn-ui sidebar tooltip fix - .tsx components (ui) + .json style configs (config)
rationale: Call-graph analysis: sidebar.tsx component and .json style definition files have no function call relationships. TSX files do not import JSON style files via call-graph edges. Multiple disconnected components = ERROR.
notes: Previously warning (ui+config = 2 domains). The .json style/registry files are logically related to the UI component but have no call-graph connectivity, making them separate components under the new analysis.
